emails.subject: PAA - Ava Garcia
emails.body: PAA Ava Garcia Shelley, I wanted to see if I could get the PAA in for Ava. I think she did a very good job on the Transwestern meeting and I would like to recognize her for that. If you approve, then I will send to Fran to fill out the appropriate information. Thanks. Lynn
